title: Duplicate automations from one workspace to another
excerpt:
Hi everyone, 
I want to know if there is a way to duplicate a list of automations from a workspace to another ? 
Using a duplicate function or an “export automation” ? 
Thank you

posts.author: Marc_Furberg (Marc Furberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I want to know if there is a way to duplicate a list of automations from a workspace to another ?

Using a duplicate function or an “export automation” ?

Thank you

posts.author: Avery (Avery Romine)
posts.cookedHtml:
I don’t believe you can do a mass duplicate.

What I like to do is either make your automations you want to bring over into a custom template, that way you can choose that on any new board.

I also create board templates that have all the automations I use frequently, so therefore all I have to do is create a board from that template and it has all the automations I wanted to carry over to a new workspace.

posts.author: Marc_Furberg (Marc Furberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you Avery,

I think we should create a board template and used it .
I will see it with my PO
